aiAssistant.greeting: Hello! How can I assist you today?
aiAssistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask me anything about the course...

responses.0: That's a great question! Let me explain...
responses.1: I can help you with that. Here's what you need to know...
responses.2: Based on the course content, I'd recommend focusing on...
responses.3: Let me break this down for you step by step...
responses.4: That's an interesting point. Have you considered...

chatbot.greeting: 👋 Hi there! I'm your AI learning assistant for 3TEduTech. How can I help you with {{lesson, default:your learning}} today?
chatbot.sendHint: Press <1>Enter</1> to send. Shift+Enter for new line.

response.hello: Hello! How can I assist you with your learning journey today?
response.thank: You're most welcome! Is there anything else I can clarify for you?
response.python: Ah, regarding {{topic}} in Python for the lesson on "{{lesson}}", they are fundamental! Loops help you repeat tasks, and functions help you organize code. Any specific part you'd like to dive into?
response.lesson: For the lesson on "{{lesson}}", that's an interesting question! I can explain the core concepts or provide some examples. What are you curious about?
response.general: That's a great question! While I don't have specific lesson context right now, I can try to help with general knowledge. Could you tell me more?
response.error: I'm sorry, I encountered an issue trying to respond. Please try again.

bankTransferPayment.title: Bank Transfer Payment
bankTransferPayment.qrInstruction: Scan the VietQR code with your banking app to auto-fill transfer details.
bankTransferPayment.amountNote: Please transfer the exact amount above for automatic confirmation.
bankTransferPayment.note1: After transferring, please wait 1-2 minutes for the system to confirm your payment.
bankTransferPayment.note2: If you have any issues, contact support for assistance.

cryptoPayment.title: Pay with {{coin}}
cryptoPayment.equivalentNote: Please transfer the correct coin, network, and amount.
cryptoPayment.note1: Wait for blockchain confirmation, which may take 10-15 minutes depending on network congestion.
cryptoPayment.note2: We will update your order status after the transaction is confirmed.

momoPayment.title: Pay with MoMo
momoPayment.qrInstruction: Open the MoMo app, select 'Scan' and scan the QR code above to complete your payment.
momoPayment.qrExpired: QR code has expired. Please generate again.
momoPayment.appInstruction: Click the button below to open the MoMo app and complete your payment.
momoPayment.appNote: You will be redirected to the MoMo app or payment website to complete your transaction.

paypalPayment.title: Pay with PayPal
paypalPayment.info1: You will be redirected to the PayPal payment page to complete your transaction.
paypalPayment.info2: After successful payment, you will be automatically redirected to the result notification page.

features.expertDesc: Learn from industry professionals with real-world experience who are passionate about sharing their knowledge.
features.anywhereDesc: Access your courses on any device, with mobile and offline viewing options to fit your busy schedule.
features.trustedDesc: Curated courses with the latest industry knowledge, ensuring you learn relevant and valuable skills.
features.interactiveDesc: Engage with hands-on projects, quizzes, and assignments to solidify your understanding.
features.creativeDesc: Utilize innovative tools and resources designed to make your learning experience more engaging and effective.

features.ai24h: 24/7 Instant Help: Get unstuck anytime with immediate answers.

footer.slogan: Empowering learners and educators worldwide through innovative technology and accessible, high-quality AI-enhanced education.

hero.title: About 3TEduTech
hero.subtitle: Empowering learners and educators worldwide through innovative technology and accessible, high-quality education.

story.title: Our Journey
story.p1: Founded in 2020 with a bold vision, 3TEduTech emerged from a desire to revolutionize how knowledge is shared and acquired. What began as a dedicated team of educators, AI specialists, and technologists has rapidly evolved into a dynamic global platform, fostering a vibrant community of instructors and millions of eager learners across the globe.
story.p2: We firmly believe that education is a catalyst for transformation, and technology is the enabler to unlock its boundless potential. Our platform ingeniously fuses cutting-edge AI with expertly-curated content, delivering an immersive and adaptive learning experience tailored to the unique pace and style of each individual.
story.p3: Today, 3TEduTech proudly serves a diverse community spanning over 150 countries, offering a rich tapestry of courses in numerous languages across a multitude of disciplines. Yet, amidst our expansion, our foundational mission remains steadfast: to empower individuals with transformative knowledge and future-ready skills.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize education by providing universally accessible, AI-enhanced learning experiences that empower individuals and organizations to achieve their highest potential and shape a better future.
mission.item1: Make world-class education available to anyone, anywhere, anytime.
mission.item2: Deliver practical, skills-based learning for tangible real-world impact.
mission.item3: Cultivate a supportive and collaborative global community of lifelong learners.
mission.item4: Continuously innovate to make learning more engaging, effective, and personalized.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the leading global platform where technology and human expertise converge, creating a future where learning knows no bounds and everyone has the power to transform their lives through education.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.learnerCentricDesc: We place learners at the heart of everything, tailoring experiences to their needs and aspirations.
values.innovationDesc: We constantly explore and implement cutting-edge AI and pedagogical approaches to enhance learning.
values.excellenceDesc: We are committed to the highest standards in course quality, platform performance, and support services.
values.accessibilityDesc: We strive to make education barrier-free, ensuring our platform is usable and affordable for all.
values.integrityDesc: We operate with transparency, honesty, and a strong ethical compass in all our interactions.
values.empowermentDesc: We aim to equip individuals with skills and knowledge that empower them to achieve their goals.
